Notice Of Motion (Motions)
Off Calendar Feb-15-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for notice of motion and motion for default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:50:13 a.m. and concluding at 10:16:35 a.m.

Plaintiff Frank Fong, as Successor Trustee of the Holly M. Fong 2014 Trust dated June 9,2014 represented by Christopher DeWys, Esq.
Defendant Man Chung Wong not appearing.

FRANK FONG is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Defendant's request to set aside default was DENIED on Apr-04-2022.

Court has reviewed the case and all filings pertaining to this hearing.
Counsel for Plaintiff presents outline, summary of case, and an offer of proof.

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. D - Grant Deed dated Jan-25-1994/Document 94-F533480-00

FRANK FONG is examined by the Court.

Court takes judicial notice of the following:

1. Jan-31-2020 Affidavit with Change of Successor Trustee/Document 2020-K897902-00
2. Document from Successor Recorder dated Jul-07-2014/Document 2014-904676-00

The matter is submitted.
Based on the summary of the case, comments made by Plaintiff's Counsel, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has proven each essential element of the complaint and Plaintiff is entitled to partition. There are no liens on the property. Court orders partition sale and appoints referee.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff as Successor Trustee of the Holly M. Fong 2014 Trust dated June 9,2014 , and against Defendant Man Chung Wong, as follows:

1. Plaintiff FRANK FONG, as Successor Trustee of the Holly M. Fong 2014 Trust dated June 9, 2014 and MAN CHUNG WONG ("Defendant") are the co-owners of the real property located at 1276-1278 42nd Avenue, City and County of San Francisco, CA 94122 ("Property") and described as:

"COMMENCING AT A POINT ON THE EASTERLY LINE OF 42ND AVENUE DISTANT THEREON 100 FEET NORTHERLY FROM THE NORTHERLY LINE OF "I" STREET AND RUNNING THENCE NORTHERLY ALONG SAID LINE OF 42ND AVENUE 50 FEET; THENCE AT A RIGHT ANGLE EASTERLY 120 FEET; THENCE AT RIGHT ANGLES SOUTHERLY 50 FEET AND THENCE AT RIGHT ANGLES WESTERLY 120 FEET TO THE POINT OF COMMENCEMENT.

BEING PART OF OUTSIDE LAND BLOCK NO. 632." APN: 1709/24.

Plaintiff is the owner as tenant in common of an undivided 50% interest in the Property and Defendant is the owner as tenant in common of an undivided 50% interest in the Property.

2. Plaintiff is entitled to partition of the Property.
3. There are no liens on the Property.
4. The Property be partitioned by sale and the proceeds of the sale shall be divided between the owners as to their respective interest in the Property and subject to any

5. The Court orders that there shall be qualified Partition Referee who will have full power to manage, market, and sell the Property and allot the portions of the proceeds to the parties according to their respective interests with any offsets and adjustments that the Referee deems necessary, and in all respects to do those things necessary to carry out the orders of this Court that yet to be entered. Should the Referee feel a bond is necessary then they shall have the ability to request this Court for setting bond amounts to be posted.

Proposed judgment to be submitted.
